nodes.label: PFTF (Physics Flow Tensor Field theory core)
nodes.norm_label: pftf (physics flow tensor field theory core)

nodes.label: PFTF_FXShock (FX shock propagation and hedge candidates)
nodes.norm_label: pftf_fxshock (fx shock propagation and hedge candidates)

nodes.label: PFTF Theorem 1: Rayleigh contraction C(n)=max(0,-n^T F(n) n)
nodes.rationale: Expresses any direction-dependent scalar cost as a Rayleigh contraction of an augmented directional tensor field, letting the SFTF trilogy be absorbed as corollaries of one unifying theorem.
nodes.norm_label: pftf theorem 1: rayleigh contraction c(n)=max(0,-n^t f(n) n)

nodes.label: M2 Routing Relaxation (differentiability of discrete routing)
nodes.rationale: Relaxing a single discrete routing operator secures end-to-end differentiability (Theorem 2/M2); identified with softmax attention via modern Hopfield in the dl-precedents section, closing M1+M2 with known deep-learning machinery.
nodes.norm_label: m2 routing relaxation (differentiability of discrete routing)

nodes.label: M3 Intermediate Tensor Field Reuse (pre-collapse)
nodes.rationale: The intermediate tensor field before collapse is reused across applications, enabling one descriptor to serve multiple downstream tasks (e.g., culling variants in VisCull).

nodes.label: Advani-Tucker Orientation Tensor Isomorphism
nodes.rationale: PFTF's symmetric baseline tensor M is isomorphic to the Advani-Tucker fiber orientation tensor, giving a bridge to composites and injection molding (S=Phi(A) in PFTF_Mold) without new machinery.

nodes.label: Directional Tensor Descriptor F = sum a_i m_i (x) m_i
nodes.rationale: Single directional-tensor descriptor composed up a BVH by plain matrix addition; one descriptor simultaneously drives backface, ray, and sibling self-collision culling. Reference implementation lives in PFTF_kDop_dev/python/src/pftf_drape/directional_tensor.py and is shared with PFTF_VisCull.
nodes.norm_label: directional tensor descriptor f = sum a_i m_i (x) m_i

nodes.label: Normal-Cone Hierarchical Culling (Track A, SDEkDOP)
nodes.rationale: Collision is a pairwise, nonlocal problem outside PFTF Theorem 1, so only the machinery transfers. Normal-cone hierarchical culling is classic since Volino 1994, so no novelty is claimed: positioned strictly as a conservative accelerator (zero false negatives; a miss would mean tunneling). Merged into the cfmsDrape engine as SDEkDOP.* (_PFTF_ConeReset/ConesCanFace/bUseConeCull/SDE_PFTF_ConeRefit).

nodes.label: Track C: Body-Radius Layer Grouping (layered garments, reduced DOF)
nodes.rationale: For layered clothing (underwear+outerwear) normal cones become direction-degenerate and powerless, so the discriminant axis was switched from direction to body-radius: body-normal ray-crossing assigns triangles to layer indices with a safe reduced-DOF mask fed into the engine's existing pPlaneConstraints (soft first); inter-layer test skipping is orthogonal to cone culling.
nodes.norm_label: track c: body-radius layer grouping (layered garments, reduced dof)

nodes.label: Directional-Tensor Conservative Culling for Rendering (generalized normal cone on BVH)
nodes.rationale: A PFTF machinery transfer (directional tensor + cone), not a Theorem 1 result. Strictly a conservative accelerator, never a replacement for exact visibility/intersection (a miss is an image error); falls back for two-sided, transparent, open surfaces and reflection/refraction rays. Differentiation from prior normal-cone backface work (Shirman-Abi-Ezzi '93) is the tensor formalization + BVH composition + unified multi-culling + benchmarks, not inventing backface culling.
nodes.norm_label: directional-tensor conservative culling for rendering (generalized normal cone on bvh)

nodes.label: Orientation-Tensor to Laplace Pressure Surrogate (P ~ T*kappa)
nodes.rationale: Contact pressure is contact-based and nonlocal, so only the anisotropic tensor descriptor + M2 relaxation transfer (not Theorem 1; contact pressure belongs to the solver). n^T M n is a first-order curvature-coupling proxy requiring FE validation (isomorphic to the composite a4 closure problem). A design/screening tool, not clinical sign-off; compression-garment FE and fabric anisotropy are existing literature, so no novelty overclaim.
nodes.norm_label: orientation-tensor to laplace pressure surrogate (p ~ t*kappa)

nodes.label: Self-Built OpenFOAM Trusted Solver (Tier1-3)
nodes.rationale: Moldflow educational license is non-commercial, conflicting with the patent policy, so core validation uses public benchmarks + self-built OpenFOAM (zero constraints), with Moldflow only as qualitative auxiliary comparison. Role split: solver = ground truth/forward, differentiability lives in the surrogate. Hierarchical build: Tier1 prescribed-eigenstrain thermoelasticity, Tier2 filling (interFoam+RheoTool) + Folgar-Tucker orientation, Tier3 PVT; establishing solver trust is the first gate.

nodes.label: Temperature Uniformity Objective
nodes.rationale: Battery pack cooling cost is temperature uniformity (max-min or sigma) rather than peak temperature, because pack degradation is driven by cell-to-cell thermal imbalance; distinguishes this PoC from SFTF_ThermalChip whose objective is peak temperature.

nodes.label: Flow Accumulation Mechanism
nodes.rationale: Upstream-accumulated flow along the support tree; reused by SFTF_BatteryThermal to model downstream coolant heating (advection): T_coolant(s) = T_in + alpha * upstream accumulated heat.

nodes.label: Thermal-Conduction / IR-Drop Isomorphism
nodes.rationale: Steady-state heat conduction div(k grad T) = -P is mathematically isomorphic to IR-drop div(sigma grad V) = -I (V maps to T, pad maps to heatsink), so the IR solver from SFTF_PDNElectric is reused unchanged as the thermal solver.

nodes.label: B_peak Proxy
nodes.rationale: Because the chip-thermal objective is peak temperature (max) rather than a sum, a B_peak proxy was added beyond the sum-based B; validation showed B_peak only adds value when choosing placement with the via count fixed (fixed-budget correction), a finding cited as a real-world case for O2 in the PFTF theory paper.

nodes.label: SFTF (Support Flow Tensor Field)
nodes.rationale: Generates build-direction candidates coarse-to-refine (512 Fibonacci directions then cone refinement) and validates them with TOMO_CPU/GPU DLL engines; on 2026-07-06 promoted to the first instance of PFTF, the general direction-cost tensor-field framework; its folder structure became the origin of the standard project template.

nodes.label: Soft Attention Routing Relaxation (SFTFSoft)
nodes.rationale: Relaxes hard routing (ray-cast argmin and gates) into soft attention/softplus so L_SFTF becomes differentiable in direction and shape (autodiff matches finite differences to ~1e-6); prototype of PFTF Theorem 2 (M2 relaxation) and direct seed of the 2027 physics-AI project; core claim Sg +0.83 reproduced under the new TomoShell2026.dll baseline.

nodes.label: cfmsCAD_suite (MOC)
nodes.rationale: Map-of-content note framing the suite as an open-source alternative to Clo3D, split into editor (cfmsCAD), solver (cfmsDrape), sewing (cfmsSew), and shared channel (cfmsShared) axes.

nodes.label: gc2dxf Converter
nodes.rationale: Converts GarmentCode spec JSON to DXF R12 flat patterns plus sewing JSON and preview, following AAMA layer conventions with a dependency-free in-house DXF writer.

nodes.label: dxf2spec Converter
nodes.rationale: Ingests real garment DXF files as preprocessing for sewing-prediction training data.

nodes.label: Differentiable SFTF Loss (Soft Receiver Attention)
nodes.rationale: 이산 라우팅의 미분가능화 계열: PFTF의 M2 라우팅 완화(이론판), Tomo_SFTFSoft의 soft attention 완화(적층제조판)와 동일 방법론의 손실함수판 인스턴스.

nodes.label: GNN Self-Supervised Build Direction Prediction
nodes.rationale: 라벨 없이 L_SFTF만으로 학습한 면-그래프 GNN이 빌드방향을 면 anti-법선 가중합으로 예측. 전체 SO(3) 회전증강은 비등변(non-equivariant) GNN에 너무 어려워 학습이 평탄해지고, 무증강은 상수 방향으로 붕괴해 일반화가 나쁨 — sphere 제외(지지질량 landscape가 거의 평탄한 퇴화 메쉬) + leave-one-mesh-out(9개 메쉬)으로 재설계, 증강은 옵션화.

nodes.label: Sg Gate Relaxation (Sharpness Sweep)
nodes.rationale: 가설: 거의-이진 게이트 = 나쁜 기울기 → 최적화 실패. 검증 결과 sharpness 24→8 완화 시 Cura 상관 +0.64 유지, TomoNV 상관 +0.28→+0.43 회복 — softening의 상관 비용이 사실상 없음이 확증됨.

nodes.label: DFSVR (Differentiable First-Hit Support-Volume Rendering)
nodes.rationale: 의도적으로 Tomo_SFTFSoft와 독립적인 theory-first 재출발: 'centroid 기반 soft receiver나 support-flow tensor가 지지 예측의 물리적 구동자'라는 주장을 상속하지 않음. 미분가능화 계열에 속하되 완화(relaxation) 대상이 라우팅이 아니라 first-hit 렌더링 적분. 순수 JAX(x64) 참조 스택 + Wolfram 독립 검증. T1(수렴 계약)은 명시적 no-go — 수렴 주장 아직 없음.

nodes.label: SFTF_DrapePrior (drape contact-prior warm-start, 체제 의존성 확정)
SFTF Contact Prior (중력방향 레이 지지/매달림 사전장)
Free-Fall Budget Argument (3cm≈16스텝≈정착의 1% — warm-start 이득 상한)
Worn-Garment Isomorphism Breakdown (착장형: 수직 레이 전 정점 지지 오판)
MIX1b 다층 평형 이탈 (warm-start가 주름 분지 변경, RMS 4.8~6.5cm)
cfms_set_positions API (rest·봉제·핀 보존 상태 주입 — 체크포인트/리플레이 범용)
